mechanism_narrative: Higher trailing 3-month growth in retail sales signals strengthening household demand and upward earnings revisions for consumer-exposed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2018-01-15 latest RSAFS vintage for 2017-12 was 495381
failure_condition: Reject if higher trailing 3-month RSAFS growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling walk-forward window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above its prior 12-month high, equity discount rates rise faster than near-term earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 12-month maximum
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2018-01-15 latest FEDFUNDS vintage for 2017-12 was 1.3
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or average triggered returns exceed the unconditional average.

mechanism_narrative: Rising CPI inflation combined with a rising federal funds rate signals a policy-driven margin and valuation squeeze, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses above 3% while FEDFUNDS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2018-01-15 latest CPIAUCSL vintage for 2017-12 was 247.963
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS trigger has no lower mean 20-day return than either single-series condition in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in unemployment from a low base signals labor-market deterioration and recession risk before earnings estimates adjust, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses 0.3 percentage points above its trailing 6-month minimum
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2018-01-15 latest UNRATE vintage for 2017-12 was 4.1
failure_condition: Reject if triggered UNRATE increases are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of observations or by returns not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Positive acceleration in industrial production signals improving operating leverage and cyclical earnings momentum, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2018-01-15 latest INDPRO vintage for 2017-11 was 106.3969
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO acceleration has nonpositive Rank IC for 60-day S&P 500 returns across two consecutive 3-year rolling walk-forward windows.

mechanism_narrative: Falling housing starts during a rising-rate period signal rate-sensitive demand destruction and weaker future construction-linked profits, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses 10% below its trailing 12-month average while FEDFUNDS 6-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2018-01-15 latest HOUST vintage for 2017-11 was 1297
failure_condition: Reject if the HOUST decline plus rising FEDFUNDS interaction does not underperform unconditional 60-day returns by at least 1 percentage point on average.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth with unemployment below 4.5% signals continued income growth without immediate labor-market stress, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average monthly change crosses above 150 thousand while UNRATE is below 4.5
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2018-01-15 latest PAYEMS vintage for 2017-12 was 147380
failure_condition: Reject if triggered PAYEMS and UNRATE observations have 20-day positive-return frequency below the unconditional positive-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: A downside CPI surprise proxy from decelerating CPI growth reduces expected policy pressure and supports valuation multiples, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses below its trailing 12-month average while FEDFUNDS is unchanged or rising
evidence_refs: fact:as of 2018-01-15 CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS monthly vintages were available through 2017-12
failure_condition: Reject if the decelerating CPIAUCSL condition during unchanged or rising FEDFUNDS fails to generate positive average 5-day S&P 500 returns after transaction-date alignment.
